_notes.The Punisher - Part 5: Removed the 2x Makarov PM find+handover objectives (FiR pistols are hard to find). Kept AK-74 + M4A1 finds and the PMC-kill objective.
_notes.Escort: Trimmed from 8 maps to 3 (kept Shoreline, Woods, Ground Zero); removed Factory, Customs, Reserve, Interchange, The Lab kill objectives.
_notes.weaponBuildStripList: RUNTIME FEATURE (not yet implemented): for each listed quest, walk every CounterCreator > Kills condition and CLEAR weaponModsInclusive + weaponModsExclusive so only the base weapon (weapon[]) is required, not the specific scope/suppressor build. Used for the Test Drive chain.
_notes.General Wares: 15 -> 5 cans of beef stew (find + handover). Matches old mod.
_notes.Car Repair: 8 -> 3 spark plugs (find + handover); car batteries kept at 4.
_notes.Crisis: Huge endgame collection. Trimmed rare items: defib 3->1, ophthalmoscope 3->1, LEDX 2->1, multivitamins 10->2. Piles of meds kept at 20 (common loot = the intended grind).
_notes.The Cleaner: 40 -> 20 Raiders on Reserve. Matches old mod.
_notes.Insomnia: 25 -> 10 PMC night kills. Matches old mod.
_notes.Peacekeeping Mission: 12 Scavs x 6 maps (72 kills in full UN uniform). Trimmed to 3 maps (kept Woods, Customs, Interchange; removed Shoreline, Streets, Ground Zero).
_notes.Special Equipment: 24 rare electronics FiR (5/5/5/5/4). Trimmed every find+handover to 2 each.
_notes.Spa Tour - Part 6: Currency handover 8000 USD (chain-internal, can't remove). Trimmed by half to 4000.
_notes.Trophies: 20 BEAR + 20 USEC dogtags (lvl 50+) FiR. Trimmed by half to 10 each.
_notes.Counteraction: 20 BEAR kills + 20 BEAR dogtags FiR. Trimmed by half to 10 each.
_notes.Safety Guarantee: Brutal armor/helmet handover (15 Zhuk EMR + 12 Vulkan-5 + 3 Killa shields). Trimmed to 1 of each.
_notes.A Life Lesson: Booze handover (8 vodka + 15 whiskey + 15 moonshine = 38 bottles). Trimmed to 3 each. Dead-end after House Arrest chain.
_notes.Key Partner: REMOVED (Constants.RemoveList): merchant grind 'Sell 75 items to Peacekeeper'.
_notes.Night Sweep: 12 rare 'unusual knives' FiR. Trimmed find+handover to 2.
_notes.Connections Up North: 50 PMC kills 40m+ with bolt-action night/thermal scope. Trimmed to 15 (kept the fun constraint).
_notes.Consolation Prize: The Lab capstone: 15 extracts + 100 Raiders. Trimmed to 5 extracts + 30 Raiders.
_notes.Indisputable Authority: Labyrinth/Minotaur boss kill. Relocated to END of Skier per Labyrinth-at-end rule.
_notes.skillConditionStripList: RUNTIME FEATURE (not yet implemented): for each listed quest, REMOVE the Skill-type AvailableForFinish condition, keeping all other objectives. If a quest has ONLY a skill condition (Signal - Part 4 = Attention 8) it becomes a pass-through (auto-complete) in its chain.
_notes.containerRewardList: RUNTIME FEATURE (not yet implemented): { questName: containerTpl }. These quests AWARD a secure container as their defining prize. The reward-rebalance pass MUST IGNORE every quest listed here (do not strip/replace their rewards) - the container is added/placed MANUALLY after rebalance. Player STARTS WITH NO CONTAINER. Full ladder: Alpha 2x2 (Debut, Prapor #1) -> Beta 3x2 (The Punisher - Part 1) -> Epsilon 4x2 (The Punisher - Part 6) -> Gamma 3x3 (The Choice: hand over Epsilon; Gamma is otherwise EoD-only/unobtainable) -> Kappa 3x4 (Collector, final). 'Give me X, get a better Y.'
_notes.Debut: AWARDS Alpha container (544a11ac4bdc2d470e8b456a) - player's FIRST container (they start with none). In containerRewardList.
_notes.The Punisher - Part 6: AWARDS Epsilon container (59db794186f77448bc595262). In containerRewardList so reward-rebalance ignores it.
_notes.The Choice: Hand over Epsilon. AWARDS Gamma container (5857a8bc2459772bad15db29) instead of 1M roubles. In containerRewardList.
_notes.Collector: Kappa capstone (Fence final). AWARDS Kappa container (5c093ca986f7740a1867ab12). In containerRewardList so reward-rebalance ignores it.
_notes.Insider: REMOVED (Constants.RemoveList): loyalty gate 'Reach LL3 Prapor'. Pulled out of Network Provider chain.

_notes.Breathing Room: Kept as a Gunsmith-style WeaponAssembly (modify IWI UZI). No change.
